message:
ci: Add GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD and dependency management

This commit introduces a complete GitHub Actions setup for the project:

CI Workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml):
- Runs on push/PR to main/master branches
- Uses concurrency groups to cancel in-progress runs
- Lint job: ruff linter and formatter checks
- Type check job: mypy type checking (soft fail for gradual adoption)
- Test job: pytest with JAX CPU-only mode
- Final aggregation job ensures all required checks pass
- Uses uv for fast, reproducible dependency management
- Caches uv dependencies for faster subsequent runs

Release Workflow (.github/workflows/release.yml):
- Triggers on semantic version tags (v*.*.*)
- Builds distribution using uv build
- Publishes to PyPI using trusted publisher (OIDC)
- Creates GitHub Release with distribution artifacts
- Generates installation instructions in release notes
- Detects pre-releases from tag format (e.g., v1.0.0-rc1)

Dependabot Configuration (.github/dependabot.yml):
- Weekly updates for GitHub Actions and Python dependencies
- Groups related dependencies (ml-core, dev-tools)
- Ignores major version bumps for core ML libraries (jax, flax, torch)
- Adds appropriate labels for PR categorization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+version: 2
+updates:
+  # Maintain dependencies for GitHub Actions
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+      day: "monday"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "ci"
+    labels:
+      - "dependencies"
+      - "github-actions"
+    groups:
+      github-actions:
+        patterns:
+          - "*"
+
+  # Maintain dependencies for Python (uv/pip)
+  - package-ecosystem: "pip"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+      day: "monday"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "deps"
+    labels:
+      - "dependencies"
+      - "python"
+    ignore:
+      # Ignore major version updates for core ML libraries
+      # to avoid breaking changes
+      - dependency-name: "jax"
+        update-types: ["version-update:semver-major"]
+      - dependency-name: "flax"
+        update-types: ["version-update:semver-major"]
+      - dependency-name: "torch"
+        update-types: ["version-update:semver-major"]
+    groups:
+      ml-core:
+        patterns:
+          - "jax*"
+          - "flax*"
+          - "optax*"
+          - "numpy*"
+      dev-tools:
+        patterns:
+          - "pytest*"
+          - "ruff*"
+          - "mypy*"
+          - "pre-commit*"

@@ -0,0 +1,122 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, master]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main, master]
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+env:
+  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.13"
+  UV_CACHE_DIR: /tmp/.uv-cache
+
+jobs:
+  lint:
+    name: Lint & Format
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Set up uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+          cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
+
+      - name: Set up Python
+        run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: uv sync --frozen --group dev
+
+      - name: Run ruff linter
+        run: uv run ruff check .
+
+      - name: Run ruff formatter check
+        run: uv run ruff format --check .
+
+  typecheck:
+    name: Type Check
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Set up uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+          cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
+
+      - name: Set up Python
+        run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: uv sync --frozen --group dev
+
+      - name: Run mypy
+        run: uv run mypy . --ignore-missing-imports
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+  test:
+    name: Test
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Set up uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+          cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
+
+      - name: Set up Python
+        run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: uv sync --frozen --group dev --group test
+
+      - name: Run tests with pytest
+        run: |
+          uv run pytest tests/ \
+            -v \
+            --tb=short \
+            --ignore=tests/test_runner.py \
+            --ignore=tests/test_runner_enhanced.py \
+            -x
+        env:
+          JAX_PLATFORMS: cpu
+
+      - name: Upload test results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: failure()
+        with:
+          name: test-results
+          path: |
+            .pytest_cache/
+            **/*.log
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  all-checks:
+    name: All Checks Passed
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [lint, typecheck, test]
+    if: always()
+    steps:
+      - name: Check all jobs passed
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ needs.lint.result }}" != "success" ]]; then
+            echo "Lint job failed"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ "${{ needs.test.result }}" != "success" ]]; then
+            echo "Test job failed"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "All required checks passed!"

@@ -0,0 +1,122 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - "v*.*.*"
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+  id-token: write
+
+env:
+  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.13"
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    name: Build Distribution
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Set up uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+          cache-dependency-glob: "uv.lock"
+
+      - name: Set up Python
+        run: uv python install ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Build package
+        run: uv build
+
+      - name: Upload distribution artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist
+          path: dist/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  publish-pypi:
+    name: Publish to PyPI
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: build
+    environment:
+      name: pypi
+      url: https://pypi.org/p/model-guided-research
+    steps:
+      - name: Download distribution artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist
+          path: dist/
+
+      - name: Publish to PyPI
+        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
+
+  github-release:
+    name: Create GitHub Release
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: build
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Download distribution artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: dist
+          path: dist/
+
+      - name: Generate release notes
+        id: release_notes
+        run: |
+          TAG_NAME="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
+          echo "tag_name=${TAG_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+          # Extract version from tag
+          VERSION="${TAG_NAME#v}"
+          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+          # Create release notes
+          cat > release_notes.md << 'EOF'
+          ## What's Changed
+
+          See the full changelog in the repository.
+
+          ## Installation
+
+          ```bash
+          # Using uv (recommended)
+          uv add model-guided-research
+
+          # Using pip
+          pip install model-guided-research
+          ```
+
+          ## Optional Dependencies
+
+          ```bash
+          # CUDA 12 support
+          uv add "model-guided-research[cuda12]"
+
+          # Visualization tools
+          uv add "model-guided-research[viz]"
+
+          # Development dependencies
+          uv add "model-guided-research[dev]"
+          ```
+          EOF
+
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          tag_name: ${{ steps.release_notes.outputs.tag_name }}
+          name: Release ${{ steps.release_notes.outputs.tag_name }}
+          body_path: release_notes.md
+          files: dist/*
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.release_notes.outputs.tag_name, '-') }}
+          generate_release_notes: true
